supportingMessage: Your generosity helps us share the hope of Christ in Kiowa and beyond.

offlineGiving.mailingAddress: Majestic View Church, 620 Commanche St, Kiowa, CO 80117
offlineGiving.inPersonInstructions: Drop your gift in the offering box on the back wall of the sanctuary during or after Sunday service.

faq.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
faq.answer: Yes. Majestic View Church is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, and your gifts are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. You'll receive a year-end giving statement.

faq.question: Can I give recurring gifts?
faq.answer: Yes — when you click 'Give,' you can set up a recurring weekly, biweekly, or monthly gift through Planning Center.

faq.question: What can I designate my gift to?
faq.answer: You can give to the general fund (operations and ministries) or designate to specific funds like Missions or Building. The giving form will show available funds.

faq.question: Who can I contact with questions?
faq.answer: Call or text the church office at 303-491-4339, or email admin@mvckiowa.com.
